summary: The user is seeking assistance in tracking and categorizing their expenses, particularly focusing on clothing and groceries. They express interest in creating subcategories for luxury and budget purchases and inquire about strategies to reduce grocery spending while maintaining quality. The session also covers meal planning and tools for tracking expenses.
facts: The user is trying to get a better handle on their spending habits by tracking expenses and categorizing them by type. The user oscillates between luxury and budget shopping, recently purchasing a designer handbag at Saks Fifth Avenue last weekend. The user is exploring ways to reduce spending on groceries and has been trying to shop more budget-friendly by buying in bulk and using coupons. The user is interested in meal planning and prep to help manage grocery spending. The user is considering using apps or tools to track grocery spending and stay within their budget. The user is open to exploring budgeting templates or spreadsheets for tracking grocery spending. The user is looking for support and guidance to get started with meal planning and prep.
